responseMessageContents.text:
The APK is ready now. Here is the file you can install and open on your Android device:

**APK path:**
`/home/user/rork-app/android-ivx-holdings/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk`

**Package:** `com.rork.ivxholdings`
**Size:** 15 MB
**Version:** 1.0 (versionCode 1)

You can download it from the Rork file explorer and install it on Android. It will open to a basic working IVX home screen.

If you want me to add the full Vercel Exit dashboard, AI agents, and IVX screens before your next install, let me know and I’ll rebuild it.
